zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Boleyn於1477年出生在英國肯特時，他的父親Sir William Boleyn26歲，母親Lady Margaret Butler23歲。他於1498年與Lady Elizabeth Howard Countess of Wiltshire在英國英格蘭諾福爾可布利可林結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1539年3月12日在英國肯特維享年62歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特維。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Boleyn于1477年出生在英国肯特时，他的父亲Sir William Boleyn26岁，母亲Lady Margaret Butler23岁。他于1498年与Lady Elizabeth Howard Countess of Wiltshire在英国英格兰諾福爾可布利可林结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1539年3月12日在英国肯特維享年62岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特維。

nameMeanings.name: Boleyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Bullen  .
Flemish: derivative of the personal name Bol, from Baldwin .

variants.name: Bullen
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from the French Channel port of Boulogne, recorded in Latin sources both as Gessoriacum and as Bononia. The latter name is clearly the source of the modern placename. It is ostensibly a derivative of Latin bonus ‘good’ (compare Bolognese ), but may in fact come from a Gaulish element bona ‘foundation’. Boulogne has long been a major trading port between England and France.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Boleyn was born in 1477, in Kent, England, his father, Sir William Boleyn, was 26 and his mother, Lady Margaret Butler, was 23. He married Lady Elizabeth Howard Countess of Wiltshire in 1498, in Blickling, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 12 March 1539, in Hever, Kent, England, at the age of 62, and was buried in Hever, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Boleyn est né en 1477, à Kent, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Boleyn, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Butler, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Lady Elizabeth Howard Countess of Wiltshire en 1498, à Blickling, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 12 mars 1539, à Hever, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Hever, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Newry, County Down, Northern Ireland, Un: Newry, County Down, Nordirland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Boleyn 1477 in Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Boleyn 26 und seine Mutter Lady Margaret Butler 23. Er hat 1498 in Blickling, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Lady Elizabeth Howard Countess of Wiltshire geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 12. März 1539 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Hever, Kent, England und wurde in Hever, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Boleyn è nato il nel 1477 nel Kent, England, il suo padre, Sir William Boleyn, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Lady Margaret Butler, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Lady Elizabeth Howard Countess of Wiltshire nel 1498, nel Blickling, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 12 marzo 1539, nel Hever, Kent, England, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Hever, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Boleynが1477年にイギリスケントで生まれた時，父Sir William Boleynは26歳，母Lady Margaret Butlerは23歳であった。1498年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクブリックリングでLady Elizabeth Howard Countess of Wiltshireと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1539年3月12日にイギリスケントヘバーで62歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントヘバーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Boleyn(이)가 1477년 영국 켄트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Boleyn(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margaret Butler(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1498년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 블릭링에서 Lady Elizabeth Howard Countess of Wiltshire(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1539년 3월 12일 영국 켄트 헤버에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 헤버에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Boleyn nasceu em 1477, em Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Boleyn, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Butler, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Elizabeth Howard Countess of Wiltshire em 1498, em Blickling, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de março de 1539, em Hever, Kent, Inglaterra, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Hever, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Newry, County Down, Northern Ireland, Un: нюри, коунти доун, Северная Ирландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Boleyn родился в 1477 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Boleyn было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Butler, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Elizabeth Howard Countess of Wiltshire в 1498 г. в местности бликклинг, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 12 марта 1539 г. в местности хивир, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности хивир, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.
